EventOperations_listEvents.usage:
val createdAfter = OffsetDateTime.parse("2024-01-01T00:00:00Z")
val response = client.export.listEvents(dateFrom = "2024-01-01", dateTo = "2024-01-01", createdAfter = createdAfter, limit = 123)

ExportOperations_createExport.usage:
val request = ExportRequest(
    startAt = "2025-03-20",
    endAt = "2025-03-20",
    webhookUrl = "example"
)
val response = client.export.createExport(request = request)
ExportOperations_createExport.output: Export(id: Int, startAt: String, endAt: String, status: String, createdAt: OffsetDateTime)
